title: The Toolkit for Technology-based Partner Services | CDC
text:
Appendix K 
Examples of acceptable use for accessing restricted website forms for health care professionals. 
Appendix L 
Examples of logic models for use by health care professionals. 
Appendix M 
A collection of suggested trainings and other resources for health care professionals. 
Appendix N 
A collection of technical assistance for technology-based partner services in health care. 
The Toolkit for Technology-based Partner Services 
A general resource for health departments, community-based organizations, and others on how to use technologies to trace and contact persons potentially exposed to STDs.
